name: PCCOOLER CPS YS1000 Fully Modular Power Supply, 80 PLUS Gold 1000W PSU, 12V-2x6 Cable, ATX 3.1 & PCIe 5.1 Ready, 105°C Rated Japanese Capacitors, ECO Mode, 135mm FDB Fan, 12 Years Warranty and PCCOOLER CPS RT620Pro Digital Dual Tower CPU Air Cooler, 6 Heat Pipes, 265W TDP, Digital Display Top Cover, 157mm Tall, Reinforced Structure, for Intel LGA1851/1700/1200/115X & AMD AM5/AM4, Black
